scenes.text:
Lifestyle is for you. Legacy
is for everyone after you.

You can spend your life accumulating things or creating things. One dies with you. The other lives on. Martin Luther King did not dream about a bigger
house. Mother Teresa did not chase followers. They built legacies that changed the world. Your legacy is the answer to one question. What did you leave behind?

Start thinking in generations, not months. What will your grandchildren inherit from your decisions
today? Not money. Values. Impact. A better world than the one you found.

The best time to plant a tree was twenty
years ago. The second best time is now.

What legacy are you building? Real
talk. Follow for legacy thinking.
